query:
INSERT OR REPLACE INTO hops (
                   trip_id,
                   user_id,
                   travel_type,
                   origin_name,
                   origin_lat,
                   origin_lng,
                   dest_name,
                   dest_lat,
                   dest_lng,
                   start_date,
                   end_date,
                   raw_json,
                   updated_at
               ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, NULL, datetime('now'))
